title: EQ - Custom EQ, UI screen, first time
scenario: Custom EQ screen displays sliders sorted from high to low frequency with default middle values and disabled Reset/Save buttons on first open
steps: Open the Custom EQ screen for the first time.
Observe the order of the sliders.
Check the number of sliders displayed.
Check the default position of each slider.
Check the state of the Reset EQ button.
Check the state of the Save EQ button.
expected: Sliders appear sorted from High to Low frequency. The number of sliders depends on the device. Default slider values are set to the middle. Reset EQ and Save EQ buttons are present but disabled.
